title: eriocycla olivieri
intro: Eriocycla olivieri, also known as the Persian valerian or valerian of the mountains, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps. Eriocycla olivieri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
